features.description: Core Organization capability. Always on — every tenant has at least the default org.
Ability to create more than one Organization per tenant. Small tier is locked at 1; Medium + Enterprise unlock this feature.
Nest Organizations via parent_id (create sub-brands under a parent brand). Enterprise-only.

Move an existing Organization to a new parent after create. Enterprise + audited. Separate from `organization.hierarchy` so compliance-heavy tenants may nest at create time yet forbid post-create moves.
Give each Organization its own logo + colors + description. When off, the tenant's default branding applies.
Set support_email / support_phone / contact_person_name / website_url per Organization for tenants running multi-brand operations that need distinct customer-facing contact routes.
